extraction.one_line_summary: MARICHKO Yakiv won his fourth sprint stage at Tour of Taihu Lake, maintaining orange jersey by 19 seconds over MARINI before final mountain stage.
tactical_patterns: Marichko sat 7th position with 600m remaining, relying on teammate leadout rather than positioning early, revealing sprint confidence.
Belly-up Triestina team repeatedly delivered sprint leadouts across multiple stages, establishing dominant train control pattern throughout race.

rider_signals.MARICHKO Yakiv: positive: Won fourth stage while acknowledging uncertainty about holding GC on final mountain stage, suggesting sprinter vulnerability on climbs.
rider_signals.MARINI Nicolas: neutral: Consistently finishing 2nd-3rd in sprints while staying within 19 seconds GC, positioning for final stage mountain upset.
rider_signals.CARTIER: negative: Dominated early breakaways but crashed on this stage, showing breakaway strength but poor bunch positioning.
